name: tetra-heatmap
description: RSSI heatmap visualisation for DAMM TetraFlex log servers

scripts.postinstall: cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.start: cd client && npm run build && cd ../server && node --import tsx src/index.ts
